pi_items.source: Task description step 5: 'Save the result as a TIFF file to ~/ImageJ_Data/processed/blobs_ml_ready.tif' resolves to /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/processed/blobs_ml_ready.tif for user 'ga' (specified in login info)
Task description step 4: 'Pad the canvas (Image > Adjust > Canvas Size) to exactly 256x256 pixels'
Task description step 4: 'Pad the canvas (Image > Adjust > Canvas Size) to exactly 256x256 pixels'
Task description step 3: 'Resize the image (Image > Adjust > Size) to be exactly 128 pixels wide, maintaining the aspect ratio'
Task description step 4: 'Ensure the background color for the padding is Black (Value 0)'. Export script (line 81) validates padding using threshold: mean_border < 5.0 for black padding detection
Task description step 5: 'Save the result as a TIFF file to ~/ImageJ_Data/processed/blobs_ml_ready.tif'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the ImageJ Blobs (25K) built-in sample image (a real image, not synthetic), sourced from https://imagej.net/ij/images/blobs.gif (256×254 pixels, GIF format, ~25KB). The task requires preprocessing this image by: (1) inverting contrast, (2) resizing content to exactly 128 pixels wide while maintaining aspect ratio, (3) padding the canvas to exactly 256×256 pixels with black background (pixel value 0), and (4) saving as TIFF to /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/processed/blobs_ml_ready.tif. All metadata claims regarding target dimensions (256×256), content width (128px), padding color threshold (< 5), and output format (TIFF) are accurate and verified against the task description and validation scripts.
